hero.subheading: Live, personal Quran classes for children and adults with caring, qualified teachers.

instructors.heading: Qualified teachers who teach with care

pricing.heading: Choose a plan that suits your routine

testimonials.heading: What our students and parents say

fatima.quote: My daughters have been learning with Dr Farhat Hashmi Online Quran Academy for 2 years. Having female teachers who understand our values has made such a difference. Highly recommend!

mohammad.quote: The male teachers here are incredibly patient with my son. His Tajweed has improved remarkably, and he looks forward to every class.

aisha.quote: Finding qualified female Quran teachers in America was challenging until we found Dr Farhat Hashmi Online Quran Academy. The flexible timings work perfectly with our schedule.

finalCta.heading: Begin your Quran learning journey today
finalCta.body: Book your free trial class and let us help you find the right path forward.

faq.heading: Everything you need to know
faq.description: Answers to common questions from parents and students.

free-trial.a: Yes. Your first 3 trial classes are completely free, with no obligation to continue.

cost.a: Plans start from $50 per month. Your final fee depends on the plan and class schedule you select.

female-teachers.a: Yes. We have qualified female teachers available for sisters and children.

platform.q: Which platform are classes held on?
platform.a: Classes are held live online using an easy, secure video-call platform.

timings.a: Yes. We offer flexible timings across time zones, subject to teacher availability.

beginners.a: Absolutely. We welcome complete beginners and guide them step by step.

one-to-one.a: Yes. Our classes are individual so each student receives full attention.

get-started.a: Book your free trial, share your preferred schedule, and we will arrange your first class.

Legal.privacyDesc: How we collect, use, and protect your personal information.
Legal.termsDesc: The terms that govern use of our classes and website.
Legal.privacyIntro: We collect information you submit through booking, contact, newsletter, and account forms — such as name, email, WhatsApp number, and preferred class details — solely to respond to your request and deliver our services.
whatWeStore: Booking and contact messages in our database
Account details if you register (email, hashed password, role)
Subscription and invoice records if you pay via Stripe
Anonymous page-view analytics for improving the site
Legal.howWeUse: We use your details to confirm trial classes, answer questions, send service emails you request, and process payments. We do not sell personal data.
Legal.termsIntro: By booking a free trial, creating an account, or purchasing a plan, you agree to use our services respectfully and provide accurate information.
Legal.classesBody: Online Quran classes are educational services delivered by assigned teachers. Schedules are confirmed after booking. Free trial classes are offered without obligation to subscribe.
Legal.paymentsBody: Paid packages are processed by Stripe. Subscriptions renew according to the plan you select until canceled via the billing portal or by contacting us.
Legal.accountsBody: You are responsible for keeping login credentials secure. We may suspend accounts that misuse the platform or harass staff or students.
